description_long: This is a yellow hard hat, commonly used as personal protective equipment on construction sites and in industrial environments. The hat features a smooth, domed crown with a prominent central ridge running from front to back, providing additional structural strength. The brim is short and slightly extended at the front, offering some shade and protection to the face, while the sides and back are more closely contoured to the head. The material appears to be rigid plastic, designed to absorb and deflect impacts. There is a visible black strap or band underneath, likely for securing the hat to the wearer's head. The surface is matte with a subtle sheen, and there are no visible decorative elements or branding.
description: A yellow hard hat with a domed crown, central ridge, and short front brim, made of rigid plastic and featuring a black securing strap underneath.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central ridge, domed crown, and the short, flat front brim.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the smooth, rounded profile and the slight extension of the brim at the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the central ridge running down the back and the close-fitting contour of the hat.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the rounded crown and the short front brim.
attribute_brim_style: short, flat front brim with minimal extension on sides and back
attribute_crown_shape: domed with a prominent central ridge
